entry.title: Image Optimization for Web: The Complete 2025 Guide | krzen.com
entry.summary: Everything you need to know about optimizing images for web performance in 2025. Formats, compression, responsive images, CDNs, and Core Web Vitals.

entry.title: WebP vs JPEG vs PNG: When to Use Each Format | krzen.com
entry.summary: A technical comparison of WebP, JPEG, and PNG image formats. File size benchmarks, quality analysis, browser support, and clear recommendations for each use case.
